Workflows

End-to-end recipes composed from MEP Bridge skill documents. Each workflow shows you what to ask the agent, what it'll ask back, and what falls out at the end. 1 workflows.

Schedules

Use this skill when the user asks to create, edit, or query Revit schedules. Covers schedule creation (custom, from template, duplicate), column management (add, remove, reorder, rename, hide), row fi…
